content.body: I read that as "don't copy-paste LLM-generated text into discussions that TC39 delegates have to waste time reading", not "don't accept any LLM-assisted PRs"
and the discussion above seemed to confirm tha

content.body: I understand Linus' skepticism given the copyright (I just assumed Rudi Theunissen was MidnightDesign's real name!) but I did actually review the tests and I believe they are (1) correct and (2) filling an actual gap
the PR isn't huge, only 8 tests, so I also don't think I hit review fatigue
